      <div class="container-2-3-2">
        <div class="text-3-4-0">
          AI engineer transitioning from a mechanical engineering background
          with a first-author research publication. I focus on building AI
          systems using
        </div>
        <div class="text-3-4-1">
          LLMs, RAG pipelines, and agent-based workflows, with an emphasis on
          real-world applications. My work includes AI-driven job automation,
          LLM-
        </div>
        <div class="text-3-4-2">
          powered search systems, and machine learning models in fraud detection
          and healthcare.
        </div>
      </div>
